creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Tameling from comment #14)

The right place to litigate this is in arch@FreeBSD.org. I'd send an email there and point people at this bug and the code. I'd also expand the writeup you've done here. If there's enough interest, we can likely get it committed. But if you don't publicize it more broadly, it will die here w/o anybody doing anything because it's too big a change for any one developer to do unilaterally.

I'll support it, though I might want reboot -f and halt -f to invoke fastboot and fasthalt.
